description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a tricycle landing gear setup. The fuselage is primarily white with blue accents along the tail, wingtips, and fuselage sides, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and features a clear, enclosed canopy with side windows, suggesting a single or dual-seat arrangement. The wings are straight and mounted above the fuselage, with subtle blue striping on the tips. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer, both accented with blue. The landing gear is fixed, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, suitable for small airfields or urban airports.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with a white and blue color scheme, fixed tricycle landing gear, and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-mounted straight wings, nose wheel, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Oblique rear-side view highlighting the blue tail accents, fixed main landing gear, and the straight wing profile.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, blue striping on the wingtips, and the overall fuselage shape.
description_view_3: Oblique front-side view showing the propeller, cockpit windows, and the blue accents on the tail and wingtips.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and blue accent striping on the wingtips; no winglets or swept features visible.
attribute_engine_type: Single piston engine mounted at the nose with a front-facing propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer; blue accent on the vertical fin.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual-seat configuration.
